hero.title: Find & Win Government
hero.subtitle: Monaqasat AI aggregates government tenders from 12+ MENA countries, matches them to your business profile, and gives you the AI-powered edge to win more contracts.

features.title: Everything You Need to Win Tenders
features.subtitle: Stop manually checking 15 different procurement portals. We do it for you — with AI.

f1.title: Unified Tender Feed
f1.desc: All government tenders from 12+ MENA countries in one dashboard. Morocco, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Egypt, and more — updated daily.

f2.title: AI Smart Matching
f2.desc: Set your company profile once. Our AI scores every new tender against your capabilities, experience, and certifications.

f3.title: Deadline Alerts
f3.desc: Never miss a deadline. Get instant notifications for new matching tenders and upcoming submission deadlines.

f4.title: Bid Intelligence
f4.desc: Historical win rates, pricing patterns, and competitor analysis. Know what it takes to win before you bid.

f5.title: AI Proposal Assistant
f5.desc: Generate proposal outlines, compliance checklists, and executive summaries from tender documents in seconds.

f6.title: Multi-Language Search
f6.desc: Search tenders in Arabic, English, or French. Our AI understands all three and finds relevant opportunities regardless of language.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From signup to winning — in 3 simple steps

s1.title: Set Up Your Profile
s1.desc: Tell us about your company: sectors, capabilities, certifications, and target countries. Takes 5 minutes.

s2.title: Get Matched Tenders
s2.desc: Our AI scans thousands of tenders daily and delivers the best matches to your dashboard, ranked by relevance.

s3.title: Win More Contracts
s3.desc: Use our bid intelligence and AI proposal tools to submit stronger bids. Track everything from one place.

t1.text: We used to spend 3 hours daily checking procurement portals. Monaqasat AI reduced that to 5 minutes and we've won 4 new contracts in 2 months.
t1.name: Ahmed Benali

t2.text: The AI matching is incredibly accurate. It found us a $2M tender in Kuwait that we would have completely missed.
t2.name: Fatima Al-Rashidi
t2.role: BD Director, TechGulf Solutions — Saudi Arabia

t3.text: Finally, a platform that understands Arabic tenders. The proposal assistant alone saves us 10 hours per bid.
t3.name: Omar Mansour

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to win more.

q1.q: How many tenders do you track?
q1.a: We currently track 10,000+ active tenders across 12+ MENA countries, with hundreds of new ones added daily from government procurement portals.

q2.a: When you set up your company profile (sectors, certifications, past experience), our AI scores every new tender against your profile and ranks them by relevance. Typical accuracy is 85-95%.

q3.q: Do you offer a free trial?
q3.a: Yes! The Explorer plan is free forever with limited features. Professional plan has a 14-day free trial with full access. No credit card required.

q4.a: Morocco, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Egypt, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, Jordan, Tunisia, Algeria, and Libya. We're adding more countries quarterly.

q5.a: Absolutely. Cancel anytime from your account settings. See our refund policy for details on refunds.

about.title: About Monaqasat AI
about.subtitle: Making government procurement accessible to every business

story.title: The Problem We're Solving
story.p1: MENA governments spend over $400 billion annually on procurement. That's roads, hospitals, tech infrastructure, defense systems — massive contracts that fuel entire industries.
story.p2: But finding these opportunities? It's a nightmare. Tenders are scattered across dozens of government portals, in different formats, different languages, with different submission requirements. A business in Morocco has to manually check 15+ websites daily just to stay current.
story.p3: We built Monaqasat AI to fix this. One platform. Every tender. AI-powered matching. So businesses can spend less time searching and more time winning.

v1.title: Complete Coverage
v1.desc: We aggregate from every major government procurement portal across 12+ MENA countries. No tender falls through the cracks.

v2.title: AI-First
v2.desc: Our matching engine learns your business and gets smarter with every interaction. Higher match accuracy over time.

v3.title: Arabic-Native
v3.desc: Built for Arabic first. Our NLP understands Arabic procurement language, legal terms, and sector-specific jargon.

v4.title: Leveling the Field
v4.desc: Small businesses deserve the same tender intelligence that large corporations have. We make it affordable for everyone.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.content: By using Monaqasat AI ('Service'), operated by Holoul AI SARL ('Company'), you agree to these Terms. The Service aggregates publicly available government procurement data and provides AI-powered analysis tools.

s2.title: 2. Service Description
s2.content: Monaqasat AI is a tender intelligence platform that aggregates government procurement opportunities from public sources across MENA countries. We provide search, matching, and analysis tools. Tender data is sourced from publicly accessible government portals.

s3.title: 3. User Accounts
s3.content: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for your account security. You must be at least 18 years old and authorized to act on behalf of your organization.

s4.title: 4. Data Accuracy
s4.content: While we strive for accuracy, tender information is sourced from third-party government portals. We do not guarantee the completeness or accuracy of tender data. Always verify details with the issuing authority before submitting bids.

s5.title: 5. Payment Terms
s5.content: Paid plans are billed monthly or annually in advance. Prices are in USD. We accept major credit cards and PayPal. We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days' notice.

s6.title: 6. Acceptable Use
s6.content: You may not: scrape or bulk-download data; resell tender data; use the service for illegal purposes; attempt to reverse-engineer our AI systems; or exceed reasonable usage limits.

s7.title: 7. Intellectual Property
s7.content: Our platform, AI models, and proprietary analysis are owned by Holoul AI SARL. Government tender data remains in the public domain. Your company profile and saved data belong to you.

s8.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
s8.content: Monaqasat AI is an intelligence tool, not a guarantee of contract awards. We are not liable for: missed tenders, inaccurate data from source portals, failed bids, or business decisions made based on our analysis.

s9.title: 9. Governing Law
s9.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Morocco. Disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Casablanca, Morocco.

s10.title: 10. Contact
s10.content:
For questions: contact@monaqasat.ai

Holoul AI SARL
Casablanca, Morocco

s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
s1.content: We collect: account information (name, email, company details); usage data (searches, saved tenders); technical data (IP, browser, device); and payment information (processed securely by our payment partners).

s2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
s2.content: We use your data to: provide tender matching and alerts; improve our AI matching accuracy; process payments; send service communications; and generate anonymized market analytics.

s3.title: 3. Data Security
s3.content: We use encryption (SSL/TLS), access controls, and regular security audits. Company profiles and search history are encrypted at rest. We follow industry best practices for data protection.

s4.title: 4. Data Sharing
s4.content: We never sell your data. We share data only with: payment processors, cloud hosting providers, and when legally required. All third parties are bound by data protection agreements.

s5.title: 5. Your Rights
s5.content: You can: access, correct, or delete your data; export your saved tenders and profile; opt out of marketing emails; and close your account at any time. Contact contact@monaqasat.ai.

s6.title: 6. Cookies
s6.content: We use essential cookies for login/preferences and optional analytics cookies. You can manage preferences in your browser settings.

s7.title: 7. Contact
s7.content:
Privacy inquiries: contact@monaqasat.ai

Holoul AI SARL
Casablanca, Morocco

s1.title: 1. Free Trial
s1.content: All new users get a 14-day free trial of the Professional plan. No credit card required. At the end of the trial, you'll be downgraded to the Explorer (free) plan unless you subscribe.

s2.title: 2. Monthly Plans
s2.content: Request a full refund within 7 days of purchase or renewal. After 7 days, no refund for the current period, but you can cancel to prevent future charges.

s3.title: 3. Annual Plans
s3.content: Full refund within 30 days of initial purchase. After 30 days, prorated refund for remaining months upon request.

s4.title: 4. How to Request
s4.content: Email contact@monaqasat.ai with your account email and reason. We process refunds within 5-10 business days.

s5.title: 5. Contact
s5.content:
Refund inquiries: contact@monaqasat.ai

Holoul AI SARL
Casablanca, Morocco
